# Cosmic Harmony: A Reflection of God's Symphony
## Scripture
"For since the creation of the world His invisible attributes, His eternal power and divine nature, have been clearly seen, being understood through what has been made, so that they are without excuse." - Romans 1:20

## Reflection
As we gaze up at the night sky, we're reminded of the breathtaking harmony that exists within our universe. The planets align, the stars shine in rhythm, and the galaxies swirl in perfect balance. This cosmic symphony is a testament to God's infinite power and divine nature. Just as a master composer weaves together disparate melodies to create a beautiful work of art, God has orchestrated the universe with precision and purpose. Every celestial body, from the smallest asteroid to the mightiest galaxy, plays its part in the grand symphony of creation.

## Prayer
Dear Heavenly Father, as we marvel at the harmony of the universe, we're reminded of Your eternal power and divine nature. Help us to see Your invisible attributes reflected in the beauty of creation. May we be in awe of Your majesty and humbled by the realization that we are a part of Your grand symphony. Tune our hearts to the rhythm of Your love and guide us to play our part in harmony with Your will. In Jesus' name, we pray. Amen.
